name: public_safety_reconciliation_job_southport_st_lt
premise: A school threat assessment model surfaced a student’s mental-health crisis notes to patrol without counselor review. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety reconciliation job southport st lt has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Zara Reed
agents.identity: I am Zara Reed, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Priya Bennett
agents.identity: I am Priya Bennett, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on long term.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on long term for immediate traction on short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Zara Reed must choose under short term versus long term. What does Zara Reed do?
